title: KandyToys Mermaid Princess Dolls (3 in a pack)
features: Mermaid Doll Set - The KandyToys Mermaid Princess Doll's Playset with Accessories is a fantastic doll set for little ones to enjoy.
Encourage Creativity - Have a beautiful Mermaid Princess doll to star in your child's magical stories and adventures.
Playtime - The mermaid set is ideal for little ones during playtime, she even makes an excellent bath companion. Plus she comes with some ocean friends to play with!
Size - Each mermaid is approximately 10cm tall from tip to tail.
description: From the brand Previous page Here at KandyToys we have a huge range of toys brought to you with over 40 years of experience. We're home to a number of household brands including M.Y and NALU, and based down in Devon! We've got everything from unicorns and dinosaurs to paddle boards and rollerskates. Whether it's traditional games and fun indoors or adventures outside, we've got something for everyone!
